privileged_info_summary: The blog post is from SCOTUSblog, authored by Amy Howe, published on March 27, 2023. The actual title is 'Court takes up civil rights "tester" case', not the title stated in metadata. The article discusses the Supreme Court case Acheson Hotels LLC v. Laufer regarding whether 'testers' have standing to sue under the Americans with Disabilities Act. The correct article URL is https://www.scotusblog.com/2023/03/court-takes-up-civil-rights-tester-case/, not the URL provided in metadata.
